economic_notes: GBEs involved in forestry operations and land development at 2179 McCallum Road. Minors Trust Fund distributions of $1,500 (summer) and $2,500 (winter) per member. Ministry of Transportation settlement of $500,000 re Mt Lehman Interchange (historical, 2006).
notes: Fiscal year is 2023 not 2024. Nation has 4 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (forestry and land development). 1 fully consolidated subsidiary (2179 McCallum Nominee Ltd). Temporary investments of $2,633,895 represent Minors Trust Funds held in GICs and are offset by matching liability. Health and Education combined as one segment; split not available. total_government_transfers includes ISC $971,947 + Government of Canada $2,166,872 + CMHC $41,724 + Province of BC $803,692 + BC First Nation Gaming $422,327 = $4,406,562; note Other First Nation Governments $211,095 excluded from government transfers total as it may be intergovernmental rather than senior government. No schedule of remuneration provided. Expenses by segment show Governance=$1,606,464, Lands & Economic Development=$2,281,990, Health & Education=$869,657, Housing & Capital=$432,812, Taxation=$227,924.
